title: Seeded Asteroid Generation, Polygons, Sizes, and Difficulty Inputs
description: Random points self-intersect, seeds are global and hidden, small rocks award less but move impossibly, spawns overlap the ship, and difficulty grows without bound. Learners cumulatively produce seeded readable asteroid factory through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inject a dedicated random generator and record seed and draw order without claiming cryptographic randomness.
Generate ordered angular vertices with bounded radius variation and validate minimum size, winding, and intersections.
Define large, medium, and small radius, speed, score, fragment, rendering, and collision contracts.
